description: Model Context Protocol server for CiviCRM — AuthX-first, schema-introspected, write-gated.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.YogiAdhik/civicrm-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the CiviCRM install, e.g. https://crm.example.org. No trailing slash.
environmentVariables.name: CIVICRM_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key of the contact the server authenticates as. Keep it on a dedicated 'MCP Bot' contact with minimum permissions.
environmentVariables.name: CIVICRM_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: CMS host: drupal, wordpress, standalone, or backdrop.
environmentVariables.name: CIVICRM_CMS

environmentVariables.description: Optional — only needed if the site enables the AuthX site-key guard.
environmentVariables.name: CIVICRM_SITE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: authx (default, recommended) or legacy for pre-5.36 installs.
environmentVariables.name: CIVICRM_AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable create / update / save / submit actions. Off by default.
environmentVariables.name: CIVICRM_ALLOW_WRITES

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable delete / replace actions. Off by default.
environmentVariables.name: CIVICRM_ALLOW_DELETES
